title: Welcome to ECSC Lab
description: This is a placeholder lesson demonstrating the new interactive task format.

tasks.title: Think like a Hacker!
tasks.content: Understanding the mindset of an attacker is the first step to defending a system.

tasks.title: Starting the Lab
tasks.content:
This room uses a virtual desktop to simulate a real system. Press the "View Site" button below to get started.

A fake banking application called FakeBank will launch. When the lab loads, you'll see the banking application running in your browser.

questions.text: What is the bank account number shown in the FakeBank application?
questions.hint: Look at the top right corner of the FakeBank site.

tasks.title: Find Hidden Pages
tasks.content: Use directory enumeration tools like GoBuster or DirBuster to find hidden pages.

questions.hint: Try common words for hidden directories.

tasks.title: Attack the Admin Page
tasks.content: Bypass the login to access the admin panel.
